channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-175] mdt_lproc.c:255: error: the frame size of 1040 bytes is larger than 1024 bytes
item.description:
http://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/build_type=server,distro=el6/10/consoleFull:

/var/lib/jenkins/workspace/lustre-reviews/build_type/server/distro/el6/BUILD/BUILD/lustre-2.0.59/lustre/mdt/mdt_lproc.c: In function 'lprocfs_wr_identity_upcall':
/var/lib/jenkins/workspace/lustre-reviews/build_type/server/distro/el6/BUILD/BUILD/lustre-2.0.59/lustre/mdt/mdt_lproc.c:255: error: the frame size of 1040 bytes is larger than 1024 bytes
make[6]: *** [/var/lib/jenkins/workspace/lustre-reviews/build_type/server/distro/el6/BUILD/BUILD/lustre-2.0.59/lustre/mdt/mdt_lproc.o] Error 1
make[5]: *** [/var/lib/jenkins/workspace/lustre-reviews/build_type/server/distro/el6/BUILD/BUILD/lustre-2.0.59/lustre/mdt] Error 2
make[4]: *** [/var/lib/jenkins/workspace/lustre-reviews/build_type/server/distro/el6/BUILD/BUILD/lustre-2.0.59/lustre] Error 2
make[3]: *** [_module_/var/lib/jenkins/workspace/lustre-reviews/build_type/server/distro/el6/BUILD/BUILD/lustre-2.0.59] Error 2
item.summary: mdt_lproc.c:255: error: the frame size of 1040 bytes is larger than 1024 bytes

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-master » i686,client,el5,inkernel #41
LU-175 don't allocate kernbuf on the stack

Oleg Drokin : e10c44e8a2a53f2dfb979d3ebc8549a509bdfef1

Files :

  • lustre/mdt/mdt_lproc.c

Integrated in lustre-reviews » server,el5-i686 #66
LU-175 don't allocate kernbuf on the stack

Brian J. Murrell : 51b5c124fbc213427a530f51c62dad573396dd0b
Files :

  • lustre/mdt/mdt_lproc.c

Integrated in lustre-reviews » client,ubuntu-x86_64 #66
LU-175 don't allocate kernbuf on the stack

Brian J. Murrell : 51b5c124fbc213427a530f51c62dad573396dd0b
Files :

  • lustre/mdt/mdt_lproc.c

Integrated in lustre-reviews » client,el6-x86_64 #66
LU-175 don't allocate kernbuf on the stack

Brian J. Murrell : 51b5c124fbc213427a530f51c62dad573396dd0b
Files :

  • lustre/mdt/mdt_lproc.c

Integrated in lustre-reviews » client,el5-x86_64 #66
LU-175 don't allocate kernbuf on the stack

Brian J. Murrell : 51b5c124fbc213427a530f51c62dad573396dd0b
Files :

  • lustre/mdt/mdt_lproc.c

It seems that we allocate too much on the stack:

static int lprocfs_wr_identity_upcall(struct file *file, const char *buffer,
unsigned long count, void *data)
{
struct obd_device *obd = data;
struct mdt_device *mdt = mdt_dev(obd->obd_lu_dev);
struct upcall_cache *hash = mdt->mdt_identity_cache;
char kernbuf[UC_CACHE_UPCALL_MAXPATH] =

{ '\0' }

;
...

with #define UC_CACHE_UPCALL_MAXPATH (1024UL)

One way to address the problem would be to allocate kernbuf with OBD_ALLOC() (as done in lprocfs_wr_nosquash_nids() for instance).
